pages.raw_text:
Members OF the republican corpor-
alton gang in the city council last
night broken even" for their defeat
rs Washington Water Power candi-
dates by voting down the ordinance
granting n franchise to the Spokane
Traction company to cross Post street
bridge. The Snyder-L Lindsey bunch
and Councilman Pearson administered
the rites of the snickersnee to the
bill. The franchise would have given
the Traction company of paralleling
Washington Water Power tracks on
the north.


At the same meeting the gang turn
ed about and gave away Northwest
boulevard to the Washington Water
Power company and passed blanket
ordinance granting the same company
the right to haul freight cars through
the city. streets.


Ordinances were passed confirming
the assessment roll for grading and
parking Adams street from Sixth ave-
